task.summary: Add context artifacts to Tink cast run state

included.reason: Root cast command defines run-state behavior.
Installable cast command must stay in sync with the root command.
Visible Codex cast alias should point at the shared Tink rules without duplicated display names.
Shared Codex Tink operating rules should stay available without becoming a visible skill.
Verifies package, install, sync, and schema expectations.

excluded.reason: The installer already copies template schema directories generically.
This slice is based on local repo behavior, so external claims are not needed.

signals.reason: AGENTS.md requires command copies to stay aligned.
The changed cast command path selected matching command copies and tests as first-pass related context.
Project verification command covers template and package checks.
The selected cast command sync group requires a manual verification check in the contract.
The selected context-map schema file requires a schema shape check in the contract.
This changed path did not match any verification hint, so no check was invented.

external_context.reason: A focused design frame can guide UI implementation without importing the whole design file.
external_context.verification_hint: compare implemented screen against the selected frame

external_context.reason: A work item can clarify scope and acceptance checks beyond design-only context.
external_context.verification_hint: confirm acceptance criteria are covered by tests or manual checks

external_context.reason: Official reference material can disambiguate behavior when the repo does not define it.
external_context.verification_hint: cite the exact docs section and verify the current version

efficiency_metrics.notes: Fixture-ratio measurement for context engineering scoring. This proves the example artifacts are internally measurable, not that production telemetry has reached 90 percent.

scores.name: unnecessary_context_reduction
scores.basis: All excluded entries carry role, cost, reuse_signal, staleness, and reason fields.
scores.limit: Fixture measurement only; needs accumulated run records before claiming production-wide reduction.

scores.name: initial_context_pack_size_reduction
scores.basis: All included entries carry role and cost, and every high-cost included entry has a verification_link.
scores.limit: Fixture measurement only; needs before/after context footprint measurements across real runs.

scores.name: review_evidence_lookup_time_reduction
scores.basis: All included entries connect role to verification_link, so reviewers can trace each included item to a check or hint.
scores.limit: Fixture measurement only; reviewer timing still needs real review observations.

scores.name: verification_omission_detection
scores.basis: Every verification_target entry points to a known verification command or verification hint.
scores.limit: Fixture measurement only; runtime-generated current-run files still need the same enforcement.

scores.name: repeated_context_reuse_accuracy
scores.basis: All context entries carry reuse_signal, and all path-cases with expected graph rules carry expected context roles.
scores.limit: Fixture measurement only; accumulated run records are still needed to prove future reuse accuracy.

scores.name: rework_probability_reduction
scores.basis: All context-diff changes carry verification links and all metric impacts identify the improved metric direction.
scores.limit: Fixture measurement only; real rework probability needs follow-up tracking of late-added required context and missed checks.
